description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and a predominantly white exterior. The structure features multiple levels with large rectangular windows, balconies with metal railings, and a spacious layout. The property includes a green lawn, several trees for landscaping, and a rectangular swimming pool at the rear. The house has a mix of open terraces and covered areas, with clear separation between private and communal spaces. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing the minimalist style.
description: A modern, white, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a green lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balconies, and a landscaped lawn with a tree on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, multiple windows, three trees, and the pool at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, a balcony, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, windows, and a single tree near the center.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, no porch, and no decorative columns or overhangs
